AC1.test: AC1: lists NBFCs within the 60-day window with correct daysToExpiry

AC2.test: AC2: excludes NBFCs whose CoR expiry is beyond the window

AC3.test: AC3: cor-expiry job is idempotent per (nbfc_id, expiry_date)

notes: All 3 ACs pass on first iteration.
Renamed src/app/api/admin/nbfc/[id] -> [nbfcId] to resolve pre-existing dynamic-slug conflict that was preventing the dev server from starting.
